models_tested.notes: 3 evals × 2 configs × 1 run = 6 runs at SKILL.md v0.5. All transcripts graded by Sonnet 4.6 (analyzer-uniformity, no Opus self-grading). Eval 3 (branch-name-collision) excluded — fixture requires a git remote with the natural branch name pre-existing, meaningfully heavier setup than the other three evals; flagged as a follow-up candidate.

3 evals × 2 configs × 1 run = 6 runs at SKILL.md v0.5. All transcripts graded by Sonnet 4.6 (analyzer-uniformity, no Opus self-grading). Eval 3 (branch-name-collision) excluded — fixture requires a git remote with the natural branch name pre-existing, meaningfully heavier setup than the other three evals; flagged as a follow-up candidate. Per-run usage (time/tokens/cache_tokens/tool_calls/errors) recovered from subagent JSONL transcripts.
